---
name: Preset submission
about: Propose a new preset under presets/<name>/. Open this before the PR.
labels: preset
---

## Preset name

<!-- e.g. "minimal", "logseq", "notion-style" — must be `[a-z0-9_-]+`. -->

## Target audience

<!-- Who is this for? Which vault tool, which workflow patterns? -->

## Required dependencies

<!-- e.g. obsidian-cli, gh, a specific terminal. -->

## Differences from `presets/tim/`

<!-- What does this preset do differently? Different status taxonomy? Different spawn template? Different daily-note shape? -->

## License confirmation

- [ ] I agree the preset will ship under CC BY-SA 4.0 (see `presets/LICENSE`).
